remember: Students will be able to define a queue and understand its characteristics.
Students will be able to recall the operations that can be performed on a queue.
Students will be able to identify the use of queues in real-world scenarios.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of a queue with examples.
Students will be able to understand the algorithms and techniques used for queue operations.
Students will be able to comprehend the time and space complexity of queue operations.
apply: Students will be able to implement a queue using arrays and linked lists.
Students will be able to use queues to solve problems related to job scheduling, print queues, and more.
Students will be able to apply the concept of queues to real-world problems such as bank teller systems and job scheduling.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the time and space complexity of different queue operations.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different queue data structures and their applications.
Students will be able to design and implement a queue-based solution for a given problem.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the concept of a queue and its characteristics.
As per NCERT objective 2: To understand the operations that can be performed on a queue, such as enqueue, dequeue, and peek.
board_exam_objectives: To understand the definition and characteristics of a queue.
To understand the operations that can be performed on a queue, such as enqueue, dequeue, and peek.
To apply the concept of queues to solve problems related to job scheduling, print queues, and more.
To analyze the time and space complexity of different queue operations.
